---
title: "Transport Monte Carlo Results"
---

This page publishes the latest full transport reporting bundle for the validated run `local_chunked_run` (2026-03-09).

## Run Metadata

- Run ID: `local_chunked_run`
- Functional unit: `kg CO2e / 1000 kcal delivered to retail`
- Design: paired-within-powertrain uncertainty; 4 scenarios x 20 reps
- Validation status: PASS

## Core Result Table

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
pt <- utils::read.csv("../assets/transport/local_chunked_run/data/transport_sim_powertrain_summary.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
pt <- pt[, c("scenario_name", "n", "mean", "median", "p05", "p95")]
names(pt) <- c("Scenario", "N", "Mean", "Median", "P05", "P95")
knitr::kable(pt, digits = 6)
```

## Paired Delta Summary

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
ps <- utils::read.csv("../assets/transport/local_chunked_run/data/transport_sim_paired_summary.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
keep <- c("powertrain", "n", "mean", "median", "p05", "p95")
if (all(keep %in% names(ps))) {
  out <- unique(ps[, keep])
  names(out) <- c("Powertrain", "N", "Mean Delta", "Median Delta", "P05", "P95")
  knitr::kable(out, digits = 6)
}
```

## Distribution and Uncertainty Graphics

![CO2 per 1000 kcal by scenario](../assets/transport/local_chunked_run/figures/co2_per_1000kcal_by_scenario.png)

![Paired deltas by powertrain](../assets/transport/local_chunked_run/figures/paired_delta_boxplot.png)

![Trip duration by scenario](../assets/transport/local_chunked_run/figures/trip_duration_by_scenario.png)

![CO2 intensity vs trip duration](../assets/transport/local_chunked_run/figures/co2_vs_duration_scatter.png)

![Trip-time diagnostic](../assets/transport/local_chunked_run/figures/transport_trip_time_diagnostic.png)

![Refrigerated split diagnostic](../assets/transport/local_chunked_run/figures/refrigerated_split_diagnostic.png)

## Animation Assets

![MC animation final frame](../assets/transport/local_chunked_run/figures/transport_mc_animation_last_frame.png)

![MC evolution final frame](../assets/transport/local_chunked_run/figures/transport_mc_evolution_last_frame.png)

- [Transport MC animation (MP4)](../assets/transport/local_chunked_run/figures/transport_mc_animation.mp4)
- [Transport MC animation (GIF)](../assets/transport/local_chunked_run/figures/transport_mc_animation.gif)
- [Evolution animation (MP4)](../assets/transport/local_chunked_run/figures/transport_mc_evolution.mp4)
- [Evolution animation (GIF)](../assets/transport/local_chunked_run/figures/transport_mc_evolution.gif)
- [Route animation diesel (MP4)](../assets/transport/downloads/route_animation_diesel.mp4)
- [Route animation BEV (MP4)](../assets/transport/downloads/route_animation_bev.mp4)
- [Route animation diesel vs BEV (MP4)](../assets/transport/downloads/route_animation_diesel_vs_bev.mp4)

## Download Bundles

- [Full report bundle ZIP](../assets/transport/downloads/local_chunked_run_report_bundle.zip)
- [Data ZIP](../assets/transport/downloads/local_chunked_run_data.zip)
- [Figures ZIP](../assets/transport/downloads/local_chunked_run_figures.zip)
- [Animations ZIP](../assets/transport/downloads/local_chunked_run_animations.zip)

Raw files:

- [Rows CSV](../assets/transport/local_chunked_run/data/transport_sim_rows.csv)
- [Paired summary CSV](../assets/transport/local_chunked_run/data/transport_sim_paired_summary.csv)
- [Powertrain summary CSV](../assets/transport/local_chunked_run/data/transport_sim_powertrain_summary.csv)
- [Graphics input CSV](../assets/transport/local_chunked_run/data/transport_sim_graphics_inputs.csv)
- [Validation report](../assets/transport/local_chunked_run/data/transport_sim_validation_report.txt)
- [Merged runs CSV](../assets/transport/local_chunked_run/data/local_chunked_run_runs_merged.csv)
